violations.description: Preventing contamination from equipment, utensils, and wiping cloths. — --Cloth for wiping food spills was not stored in sanitizing solution (at proper concentration) between uses. Lactic acid sanitizing solution for wiping cloths was found at 0ppm. Lactic acid solutions should be 700-1875ppm.

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. Soup, prepared on Saturday, was found not date marked. Cooked chicken also found not date marked. Potentially hazardous foods should be date marked when held for more than 24 hours.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Food contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Slicer was found with food debris during inspection. Slicer should be more thoroughly cleaned after use.

Manual cleaning and sanitizing requirements. — --Sanitizer solution for three compartment sink was not maintained at the proper concentration. Three compartment sink lactic acid sanitizing solution was found at 0pp. Lactic acid solutions should be 700-1875ppm.

Sanitizing solution testing devices. — --Test strip or kit that accurately measures the sanitizing concentration was not provided. Testing strips for lactic acid sanitizing solutions used in this facility were not available during inspection. Testing strips should be available to make sure proper solutions strengths are used for sanitizing equipment.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. Ceiling above freezer in the back storage room was found chipped, peeling. This should be maintained in good repair.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Cleaning frequency, maintained clean (1 pt deducted)
Clean dry location, protected (1 pt deducted)
Thermometers provided, used, clean, and accurate (1 pt deducted)
